name: zarbin
description: Zarbin (زرین) - Persian personal finance accountant app. Cross-platform web app packaged as Android APK via Capacitor.

scripts.build:web: echo 'Web app is in /www, no build step needed' && exit 0
scripts.build:apk:debug: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease

author: SonaMother
